verses.text: Jabin of Canaan oppresses Israel with iron chariots. Oppressed. Sin brings a hard yoke.
Jabin of Canaan oppresses Israel with iron chariots. Oppressed. Sin brings a hard yoke.
Jabin of Canaan oppresses Israel with iron chariots. Oppressed. Sin brings a hard yoke.
Deborah, a prophetess, judges Israel. Deborah. God raises a woman to lead.
Deborah, a prophetess, judges Israel. Deborah. God raises a woman to lead.
She summons Barak to fight Sisera, promising victory. The call. God appoints the battle.
She summons Barak to fight Sisera, promising victory. The call. God appoints the battle.
Barak will go only if she goes; the honour shall fall to a woman. Condition. Faith mixed with fear.
Barak will go only if she goes; the honour shall fall to a woman. Condition. Faith mixed with fear.
Barak gathers at Tabor; Sisera comes with his chariots. Mustered. The armies meet.
Barak gathers at Tabor; Sisera comes with his chariots. Mustered. The armies meet.
Barak gathers at Tabor; Sisera comes with his chariots. Mustered. The armies meet.
Barak gathers at Tabor; Sisera comes with his chariots. Mustered. The armies meet.
God routs Sisera; Barak pursues; all the host falls. Routed. The LORD gives victory.
God routs Sisera; Barak pursues; all the host falls. Routed. The LORD gives victory.
God routs Sisera; Barak pursues; all the host falls. Routed. The LORD gives victory.
Sisera flees to Jael's tent and is hidden. Fled. The captain seeks refuge.
Sisera flees to Jael's tent and is hidden. Fled. The captain seeks refuge.
Sisera flees to Jael's tent and is hidden. Fled. The captain seeks refuge.
Sisera flees to Jael's tent and is hidden. Fled. The captain seeks refuge.
Jael drives a nail through his temples. Jael. The promise to a woman is kept.
Jael drives a nail through his temples. Jael. The promise to a woman is kept.
God subdues Jabin before Israel. Subdued. The oppressor is broken.
God subdues Jabin before Israel. Subdued. The oppressor is broken.
